item.name: Wine Coupe Tower
item.description:
A decadent array of carefully stacked glasses, sure to impress guests at parties...as long as they don't come crashing down.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Critical Hit Bonus: +4% (Max 10)
VIT Bonus: +5% (Max 12)
Gear Durability Bonus: +3
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
